title: Concentrate on profession: Supreme Court refuses to entertain 25 PILs filed by one lawyer
description: The Supreme Court on Friday declined to entertain 25 public interest litigation petitions (PILs) filed by a single petitioner, advocate Sachin Gupta. A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi asked the petitioner to concentrate on his legal practice instead of filing PILs."Concentrate on the profession. When the time is correct we will entertain the cases as well. But first try to sensitise and deal with issues," CJI Kant remarked.The pe
